_meta.description: Entitlement terms, channels, renewal, and linking to cases.

mcq.q: What is an Entitlement in Dynamics 365 Customer Service?
options: A security role granting agents access to case records
A record that defines the support terms a customer is entitled to, such as number of cases or support hours
A routing rule that assigns cases to specific agents
A template for automatically creating cases from emails
mcq.explanation: Entitlements define the support contract terms for a customer — specifying how many cases or hours of support they can receive in a period. Cases can be decremented against an entitlement automatically.
wrongExplanations: Security roles control record-level access for agents — they are not entitlements.
Routing rules assign cases to queues or agents — they are separate from entitlements.
Automatic case creation from emails is handled by Record Creation and Update Rules, not entitlements.
